channel.title: Records of the !mmortal Data Scientist — Writeups
channel.description: Personal writeups — opinions, notes, and reflections that aren’t AI theory.

item.title: On building spaceships and surviving floods
item.description: When you believe a flood is coming, the only way to survive is to build the ship, even when no one believes you. So you pick up the hammer.

item.title: Morocco and AI Illiteracy — Part I: The Cost of Staying Behind
item.description: Morocco's AI gap is not a talent problem. It is an education, access, and policy problem — and the cost of falling further behind compounds every year the gap widens.
